content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 24, 2026, focused on finalizing documentation for token-by-token streaming capabilities and initiating critical infrastructure security improvements for the cloud runtime environment.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Streaming Documentation and Verification**
* Added in-browser video evidence and supporting documentation for token-by-token dashboard streaming, confirming functionality against live cloud models (Together AI). This completes the final open item for streaming verification ([#9209](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9209)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#9230](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9230): fix(cloud): isolate untrusted app builds from the runtime fleet (Product-2 BLOCKER #6).
* [#9229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9229): fix(cloud): bind app host ports to loopback + dial node-local Caddy (apps ingress).

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None.

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
